mapper.select: SELECT fortune_id , ticker , fortune_date , content , use_yn , reg_dt , upd_dt FROM tbl_stock_fortune WHERE ticker = #{ticker} AND fortune_date = #{fortuneDate} AND use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT ticker FROM tbl_companies WHERE ticker = #{ticker} UNION SELECT CASE WHEN EXCHANGE = 'KOSPI' THEN CONCAT(STOCK_CD, '.KS') WHEN EXCHANGE = 'KOSDAQ' THEN CONCAT(STOCK_CD, '.KQ') ELSE STOCK_CD END FROM tbl_stock_info WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND (STOCK_CD = #{ticker} OR CONCAT(STOCK_CD, '.KS') = #{ticker} OR CONCAT(STOCK_CD, '.KQ') = #{ticker}) LIMIT 1
